source:
Well done, this train will now depart.
Keep an eye on it as it leaves the station, then your duties for this train are complete.
target:
做得好，这趟列车现在将要发车。
在列车驶离车站时密切关注其状态，随后你对该列车的工作便宣告完成。

source: You are now a platform dispatcher! Ensure passenger safety and a safe dispatch for trains leaving this platform.
target: 你现在是一名站台发车员！请确保旅客安全并保证从该站台驶离的列车安全发车。

source: You can't start dispatching as you are currently driving a service.
target: 由于你当前正在驾驶列车，因此无法开始发车工作。

source: You can't start dispatching as you are currently in Guard Mode.
target: 由于你当前处于乘务员模式，因此无法开始发车工作。

source: You can't start dispatching at this platform as you are still dispatching at another location. Put your equipment away and try again.
target: 你无法在此站台开始发车工作，因为你仍在另一地点执行发车任务。请收起你的装备并重试。

source: Your dispatcher session has ended as you entered Guard Mode.
target: 由于你进入了乘务员模式，你的发车员任务已结束。

source: Your dispatcher session has ended as you have started driving a train.
target: 由于你已开始驾驶列车，你的发车员任务已结束。

source: Your dispatcher session has ended as you have travelled too far away from the station.
target: 由于你距离车站过远，你的发车员任务已结束。

source: Your next train is due to depart at {HH}:{MM}.
target: 你的下一班列车预定于 {HH}:{MM} 发车。
